chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 57 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.268/2023 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 01.02.2023 Mr. Deedar Ali M. Chohan, Advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Athar Hussain Abro, Advocate files power and statement along with certain documents on behalf of respondent No.6, while statements have also been filed by respondents No.2, 3, 4 and 5, which are taken on record. A.S.I. Mumtaz Ali Ujjan, Investigating Officer of Police Station Shaheed Murtaza Mirani, District Khairpur is present and files copy of statement of petitioner No.1 recorded under Section 161, Cr.P.C. in aforementioned crime/F.I.R, wherein she has stated that she contracted love marriage with petitioner No.2 as per Muhammadan Law and her sweet wish; neither she is abducted nor kidnaped by any person and the F.I.R. is false one. Investigating Officer states that he will make this statement part of the final challan/report under Section 173, Cr.P.C. and shall submit the same before the Judicial Magistrate concerned for obtaining orders in accordance with law. Learned Counsel for the petitioners, on being satisfied with the statement of Investigating Officer, seeks disposal of this petition with direction to police officials to provide protection to the petitioners. Accordingly, instant petition is disposed of along with listed application by directing the police officials concerned to provide protection to the petitioners in accordance with law.

Learned Counsel for the petitioners, on being satisfied with the statement of Investigating Officer, seeks disposal of this petition with direction to police officials to provide protection to the petitioners. Accordingly, instant petition is disposed of along with listed application by directing the police officials concerned to provide protection to the petitioners in accordance with law. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
